siteTitle: Vibe Workflow - Open-source AI workflow orchestration platform
siteDescription: Vibe Workflow is a free, open-source, self-hosted node-based AI workflow orchestration platform that helps you build generative AI flows with a visual node editor, without a subscription.
siteOgDescription: Free, open-source, self-hosted node-based AI workflow orchestration platform for building generative AI flows with a visual node editor.
siteTwitterDescription: Free, open-source, self-hosted node-based AI workflow orchestration platform for building generative AI flows.
